package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerMixesHtmlJsonAndFileResponses() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_mixes_html_json_and_file_responses"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that serve fundamentally different transport modes from one function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
